{{CargoClone
|name=Chaebol Chief
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=103
|gene1={race} HP +500
|gene2={race} CIV +50
|gene3=Each round, {race} HP +300
|gene4=Per 60 Mutant Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +6
|gene5=Demon God Cabin, deployable robots +2
|gene6=Per 60 Mutant Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +10
|gene7=Demon God Cabin, deployable robots +3
|}}
